name: Setuna:Legend of Hamburger 2
short_description: All motions, all frames cancelable. The second installment of the ultra-free 3D action-adventure [SETUNA]. Challenge the limits of your skills with a fully professional-grade input system!
detailed_description:
A fleeting yet heartrending hamburger story awaits you.

"Setuna" sets out to visit his warrior comrade "Kaede." The player becomes "Kaede" and experiences a legendary tale. With an overwhelmingly smooth gameplay feel, cut down enemies freely and without restraint!

Featuring a completely professional-grade, original action mechanic—the "Motion Control System"—where every motion and every frame can be canceled. Now even more powered up!

Players can cancel any action on a frame-by-frame basis and seamlessly chain it into the next move. It perfectly captures and expresses the precise input mastery of expert-level players.

Aerial movement, inertia-based movement system, and smooth camera control give you complete domination over 3D space.

The new system, the “Inertia Movement System,” instantly harnesses the propulsion of high-speed movement. A professional-grade movement system that overturns the conventional wisdom of traditional action games.

Camera adjustments on par with e-sports shooting games. By eliminating unnecessary character motions, perfect rotational control is achieved. Players can take complete command of the 3D space.

【Single-player only, no corrections whatsoever, fully direct input. Perfect optimization prioritizing processing speed. High-speed performance.】

※Zero development cost, single-person development team. A personal research project.

※Permission is granted for anyone to freely use and distribute the game content in videos or live streams without restrictions.

supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
